summary: Generate a new Risk Assessment
description:
This method will calculate the risk and generate a risk assessment based on the options and data defined in the request DTO.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskCalculatorAccess

summary: Get Risk Assessment by task id
description:
This method will retrieve risk assessment by assigned task id .

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskCalculatorAccess

summary: Get multiple Risk Assessments
description:
This method will retrieve risk assessments for provided taskIds

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskCalculatorAccess

summary: Get Risk Assessments for Related Parties by task id and entity ids
description:
This method will retrieve risk assessments for related parties based on the given task id and entity ids.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskCalculatorAccess

summary: Get Risk Assessment for Related Party by task id and entity id
description:
This method will retrieve a specific risk assessment for a related party based on the given task id and entity id.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskCalculatorAccess

summary: Get all Risk Calculator Option Models
description:
This method returns all risk calculator options for the given tenant.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationAccess

summary: Get the Risk Calculator Options for a given Scope
description:
This method will query which risk calculator options are a match for the given scope parameters, and return a list of all options that match, including those that are flagged as Always Return.

Required permissions:
At least one of the following permissions is required: RiskConfigurationAccess, RiskCalculatorAccess

summary: Get an existing Risk Calculator Option model
description:
This method returns the risk calculator option model data for a given model id.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationAccess

summary: Get all RiskConfiguration models
description:
This method returns all risk configuration models for the given tenant.

Required permissions:
At least one of the following permissions is required: RiskConfigurationAccess, RiskCalculatorAccess

summary: Get the active version of an existing RiskConfiguration model
description:
This method returns the active, currently in effect, published version for a given risk configuration model.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationAccess

summary: Get the specified version of an existing RiskConfiguration model
description:
This method returns the, specified by number, version for a given risk configuration model.

Required permissions:
At least one of the following permissions is required: RiskConfigurationAccess, RiskCalculatorAccess

summary: Get the specified risk configuration collection
description:
This method returns the, specified by id, risk configuration collection data.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationAccess

summary: Get the specified item of a risk configuration collection
description:
This method returns the specified collection item of the given risk configuration collection.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationAccess

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationAccess

summary: Get all Risk Models
description:
This method returns all risk models for the given tenant.

Required permissions:
At least one of the following permissions is required: RiskConfigurationAccess, RiskCalculatorAccess

summary: Get the active version of an existing Risk model
description:
This method returns the active, currently in effect, published version for a given risk model.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationAccess

summary: Get the specified version of an existing Risk model
description:
This method returns the, specified by number, version for a given risk model.

Required permissions:
At least one of the following permissions is required: RiskConfigurationAccess, RiskCalculatorAccess

summary: Get all scoping rule sets
description:
Returns the list of all scoping rule sets.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationAccess

summary: Get the current scoping rule set version by scopingRuleSetId
description:
Returns the active, currently in effect, published version of scoping rule set for a given rule set id.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationAccess

summary: Get scoping rule set version by scopingRuleSetId and versionNumber
description:
Returns scoping rule set version for a given id and version number.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationAccess

summary: Get all Threshold models
description:
This method returns all threshold models for the given tenant.

Required permissions:
At least one of the following permissions is required: RiskConfigurationAccess, RiskCalculatorAccess

summary: Get the active version of an existing Threshold model
description:
This method returns the active, currently in effect, published version for a given threshold model.

Required permissions:
At least one of the following permissions is required: RiskConfigurationAccess, RiskCalculatorAccess

summary: Get the specified version of an existing Threshold model
description:
This method returns the, specified by number, version for a given threshold model.

Required permissions:
At least one of the following permissions is required: RiskConfigurationAccess, RiskCalculatorAccess
